mapper.insert: insert into users (login_id, password, nickname, email) values (#{loginId}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{email})
mapper.select: select * from users where login_id = #{loginId} and status = 'active'

select user_id as userId, login_id as loginId, nickname as nickname, email as email, role as role,
profile_img as profileImg, created_at as createdAt from users where user_id = #{userId}

SELECT user_id AS userId, login_id AS loginId, password, nickname, email, status, role, suspension_reason AS suspensionReason, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, deleted_at AS deletedAt, profile_img AS profileImg FROM users WHERE login_id = #{loginId}

SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS nickname, u.profile_img AS profileImg, COUNT(g.gram_id) AS score FROM grams g LEFT JOIN users u ON g.user_id = u.user_id WHERE g.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY u.user_id ORDER BY score DESC, MAX(g.created_at) DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT p.product_id AS productId, p.name AS name, p.image_url AS imageUrl, p.description AS description, p.price AS price, p.weight AS weight, p.kcal AS kcal, p.protein AS protein, p.sodium AS sodium, p.sugar AS sugar, p.saturated_fat AS saturatedFat, p.caffeine AS caffeine, b.brand_name AS brandName, COUNT(g.gram_id) AS count FROM grams g LEFT JOIN product_items p ON g.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN product_brands b ON p.brand_id = b.brand_id WHERE g.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY p.product_id, p.name, p.image_url, p.description, p.price, p.weight, p.kcal, p.protein, p.sodium, p.sugar, p.saturated_fat, p.caffeine, b.brand_name ORDER BY count DESC, MAX(g.created_at) DESC LIMIT 5

select p.post_id, p.title, p.view_count, p.created_at
from posts p where p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status != 'deleted' order by p.created_at desc

SELECT f.target_user_id AS targetUserId, f.description AS description, f.created_at AS createdAt, u.nickname AS nickname, u.profile_img AS profileImg, u.status AS status FROM user_favorites f INNER JOIN users u ON f.target_user_id = u.user_id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
